final:
module RefModule(
  input CLK,
  input RST,
  input [3:0] D,
  output reg [3:0] Q
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or negedge RST or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (!RST) begin
      Q <= 4'b0;
    end else begin
      Q <= D;
    end
  end

endmodule
